title: Adjacent-rival pressure
summary: Capture immediate tactical pressure from the cars directly ahead and behind in current position order.
rationale: Neighbor-pressure variants were attempted but often weaker or bug-prone. The concept is still relevant for undercut/cover decisions because direct rivals matter more than the whole field.
implementation_hint: Within each race-lap snapshot, sort by `Position` and add ahead/behind peer values and deltas for tyre age, lap-time delta, degradation, and finish-window pressure. Restore original row order after assigning features.
expected_effect: Small ROC AUC gain with low confidence.
risk: Earlier versions suffered alignment issues and may overfit noisy position snapshots; implement only if row-index handling is robust.
